mapper.select: select t1.create_time, t1.cpu_usage, t1.cpu_count, t1.memery_used, t1.memery_max, t1.uptime, t1.disk_free, t1.disk_total, t1.health_db, t1.health_disk_space, t1.health_mail, t1.health_ping, t1.health_rabbit, t1.health_redis, t1.health_ssl, t1.health from sys_actuator t1 where t1.create_time between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and t1.del_flag = 0 order by t1.create_time desc

select t1.create_time, t1.health_db, t1.health_disk_space, t1.health_mail, t1.health_ping, t1.health_rabbit, t1.health_redis, t1.health_ssl, t1.health from sys_actuator t1 where t1.create_time between #{request.startTime} and #{request.endTime} and t1.del_flag = 0 order by t1.create_time desc
select t1.cpu_usage, t1.cpu_count, t1.memery_used, t1.memery_max, t1.uptime, t1.disk_free, t1.disk_total from sys_actuator t1 where t1.del_flag = '0' order by t1.create_time desc limit 1
